blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 120 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
